final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey) in a 90s Hong Kong film style.

Style/medium: needs a 90s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 in an embrace/kiss at the city wall as central focal point, 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance
Subject: must include 至尊宝, 紫霞 (embracing/kissing), 牛魔王, and 唐僧
Scene/backdrop: must include the iconic city wall setting
Lighting/mood: needs a nostalgic romantic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 90s Hong Kong film palette — exact grading is yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the 大话西游 narrative context and character relationships
Avoid:
